articles.author: Matt Holder
articles.title: Raiders NFL draft: Takeaways from Fernando Mendoza’s pro day - Silver And Black Pride
articles.description: A few observations from expected No. 1 overall pick in the 2026 NFL draft Indiana quarterback Fernando Mendoza’s pro day in front of the Las Vegas Raiders.
articles.content: It felt like just a formality at this point, but expected No. 1 overall pick Fernando Mendoza has crossed another checkpoint ahead of the 2026 NFL draft, completing Indianas Pro Day on Wednesday, Apr… [+3796 chars]
